description: Calendrical text and table for three months in the year 5594 AM (1833/34 CE) on the recto and verso. The recto provides an exceptional level of detail for equivalent years across other calendars: 1834 "for Christians," 1766 "since the destruction [of the Second Temple]," 1546 "for Copts," 1249 "for Yishmaʿel" (Hijrī). MCD.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
